title: AccountWithdrawRequest (v1)
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/agents/{motebitId}/withdraw — the money-out debit. Idempotency-Key header required; amount positive decimal USD. See spec/market-v1.md §2.8.

destination.description: Solana base58 (Path 0) or EVM 0x-hex (Path 1) payout address; omitted ⇒ manual/pending.

idempotency_key.description: Optional body-level idempotency key; when absent the required Idempotency-Key header is used.

destination.description: Solana base58 (Path 0) or EVM 0x-hex (Path 1) payout address; omitted ⇒ manual/pending.

idempotency_key.description: Optional body-level idempotency key; when absent the required Idempotency-Key header is used.
